name: Indoor Links
about: Indoor Links is a custom golf simulator design-builder specializing in transforming spaces into top-tier golf simulator environments. They provide expert design and installation services for homes, businesses, and commercial properties, adapting to unique visions without being tied to a single technology platform. The company offers a comprehensive suite of services including custom design, professional installation, and ongoing equipment tune-ups, with a focus on creating seamless and immersive golf experiences in various settings such as warehouses, basements, garages, and retail spaces.
why_golfers_like_it: Expert design-build services tailored to any unique space or vision
Experience with the industry's top launch monitor technologies and brands
Free-standing, disassemblable studios that can be moved between locations
Ongoing TuneUps service to ensure precision-calibrated equipment performs flawlessly
Flexible solutions for various environments from garages to commercial facilities

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you would need to bring your own clubs for your golf simulator session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The content doesn't specify policies outside food, so it's best to contact Indoor Links directly for their BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes would depend on your simulator setup and software, which can be discussed during your consultation.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While Indoor Links has created spaces in family rooms, there is no specific mention of junior programs or child-friendly amenities.
